rationale: Review 2's findings (unused AlgPoints at the exact def site; heavy AlgebraicClosure import vs. IsAlgClosed use) are directly confirmable in the diff, and acting on them produces a strictly cleaner PR with no dead code or unnecessary deps. Review 1's layer/roadmap/dir-split claims cannot be confirmed from the diff (which presents the mixed defs + AlgebraicGroup/ path as-is per its own docstring), so acting on them risks non-material reorganization.
